response.justification: Bogdan's extensive experience as a Senior/Staff Software Engineer across multiple companies demonstrates deep fullstack expertise, particularly in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, which align well with the role's requirements. His work with AWS services (CDK, S3, etc.) and Kubernetes is highly relevant to the job's technical stack. However, his lack of direct PostgreSQL experience and the more senior-level roles he has held may require adjustment to the junior/mid-level responsibilities.
strengths: Strong fullstack development background with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AWS services (CDK, S3, etc.) and Kubernetes, which are nice-to-haves
Proven ability to learn new technologies quickly and contribute to scalable systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primary database requirement)
Overqualified for the junior/mid-level role, which may lead to role mismatch
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his current work (remote-friendly roles)
